saved_secret_keep_empty: Saved key detected, leave empty to keep it unchanged
llm_config_required_notice: LLM is not configured yet. Please finish setup first.
llm_ready_start_game: LLM configured successfully. You can start the game now.
llm_connection_failed_config: LLM connection failed. Please configure it first.
game_reinitialized: LLM configured successfully. The game has been reinitialized.
player_identity_desc: Set the room-facing display name for this viewer and review the players already active in this world.
auth_desc: Register or log in with email and password. After registration you continue immediately in the current session instead of relying on a temporary guest identity.
auth_hint_play_now: Registration keeps you in the current session immediately. Login switches the current identity to that account.
play_flow_desc: Move through one clear path: bind an identity if you want one, choose the room, start the world, secure your sect, name your main disciple, then enter the map.
play_flow_guest_hint: Guest play is allowed. Bind an account now if you want this campaign to stay attached to your email and password.
play_flow_registered_hint: This campaign is already attached to an account. You can continue directly from here.
play_flow_room_switch_hint: Stay in the current room, open a new private world, or move into another room before the world starts.
play_flow_room_join_hint: If you received an invite code, join the private room here before starting.
play_flow_world_idle: No world is running in this room yet. Start one here.
play_flow_world_waiting: This room is preparing the world. Stay on this page until the map is ready.
play_flow_world_ready: The world is ready in this room.
play_flow_start_ready: The room is live. Finish the opening campaign setup below, then enter the world.
play_flow_campaign_waiting: The campaign setup opens after the room finishes generating the world.
play_flow_enter_hint: Everything is ready. Enter the world and begin issuing orders.
player_campaign_desc: Complete the opening setup for this seat: claim a sect, pick a main disciple, and enter the world with a real position instead of free-looking as a spectator.
player_campaign_claim_empty: No active sects are available to claim in this world.
player_campaign_main_avatar_empty: This sect has no living disciples available yet.
player_campaign_ready_desc: Opening setup is complete. You can now use sect directives, support actions, and avatar objectives with a clear faction position.
player_identity_placeholder: Enter a display name, for example Azure Sectmaster
player_identity_roster_empty: No registered players are active in this room yet.
control_seats_desc: Switch between different player seats inside the same world to simulate multi-faction control and separate intervention budgets.
control_seats_placeholder: Enter a new seat ID, for example seat_b
control_seats_unavailable: Control seats are available only after the world is running.
control_rooms_desc: Create or switch isolated world rooms for private realms, parallel runs, and paid world operations.
control_rooms_placeholder: Enter a new room ID, for example guild_alpha
control_rooms_unavailable: World rooms cannot be switched while initialization is in progress.
control_room_access_denied: You do not have access to this room
control_room_join_failed: Failed to join room with invite code
control_room_billing_renewal_recommended: Renew now to avoid plan downgrade
control_room_billing_toast_soon: Room {roomId} needs renewal soon. {days} days left before {date}.
control_room_billing_toast_urgent: Room {roomId} needs renewal now. {days} days left before {date}.
control_room_billing_toast_grace: Room {roomId} is in grace period until {date}. Renew now to avoid downgrade.
control_room_billing_toast_expired: Room {roomId} has expired. Renew to restore the paid plan.
control_room_plan_locked_by_billing: Current plan is being downgraded by billing limits
control_room_plan_locked_hint: This billing state only allows the entitled tier to run. Higher requested plans are automatically downgraded.
control_room_payment_order_create_failed: Failed to create room payment order
control_room_payment_reconcile_note_plac: Enter transfer note or webhook content
return_to_main_desc: Return to title screen (Unsaved progress will be lost)
quit_game_desc: Close application and exit to desktop
about_github_desc: This is an open-source project. If you have a GitHub account, please support us with a Star!
about_contributors_desc: Thanks to all the creators who contributed to this open-source project!
auto_save_desc: Automatically save the game every decade in January

placeholders.sect: Select sect (leave empty for rogue cultivator)

delete_avatar.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete character {name}? This action cannot be undone.
